## Type

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — cleanup, config, deps
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is based on `dev` (not `main`)
- [ ] I ran `npm run dev` and tested locally
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint` with no errors
- [ ] If I changed the Prisma schema, I created a migration (`npx prisma migrate dev --name ...`)
- [ ] If I changed the Prisma schema, I ran `npx prisma generate`
- [ ] New files have `@fileOverview` and `@stability` tags
